name: Paper suggestion

---

**Field / Topic**
Which field or topic does this suggestion apply to?

**Paper details**
- Title:
- Authors:
- Year:
- Journal:
- DOI:

**Branch or thematic cluster**
Which core branch or thematic cluster does this paper cover?

**Why this paper should be included / why it should replace an existing selection**
Use the five-dimension framework: foundational contribution, methodological innovation, empirical significance, branch coverage, irreplaceability.

**Evidence of canonical status**
- PhD field course syllabi from: [list universities]
- Handbook chapter: [title / chapter]
- JEL / JEP review article: [citation]
- Other:

**Which existing paper (if any) should it replace?**
